title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Momonosuke, Kid, Unknown person #3, Oden as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is true that no Samuel intruders were spotted. But...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was impossible to think that you would not come....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know your tenacity better than anyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let you continue with your raid!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know these guys!! I saw them 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even though they are only paintings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They look just like you, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Our heads aren't cut off yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that brat tried to resist as much as he could...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: saying he didn't want to be a burden for you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He picked up a knife from somewhere,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Broke his ties and tried to run away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there's no way I'd let him escape. Unfortunately for him... he managed to stab my hand.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Naturally, I had to correct his behaviour until he lost consciousness.

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: But well, surprisingly, the kid survived!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we won't have to worry about that for long!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As we speak, in the concert hall inside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GRR, what's up with your arm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KAKAKAKAKE!!! ALL WE HAVE TO DO IS STALL FOR TIME!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good. I will have to ask you to stay quiet from now on, Kanjurou-san.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know the scars left by my blade linger even in the afterlife, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just as the snow left in spring,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The WOUND I'M GOING TO GIVE YOU WILL KEEP HURTING YOUR SOUL....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 47 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
